### Page
- Page URL: https://qa-beta.veevacrossix.com/login
- Page Title: Veeva Crossix
### Snapshot
```yaml
- generic [ref=e3]:
  - generic [ref=e4]:
    - img [ref=e6]
    - generic [ref=e12]:
      - text: Use of Veeva Crossix deliverables subject to contractual restrictions and usage guidelines as set forth at
      - link "https://www.veeva.com/crossix-data-usage-policy" [ref=e13] [cursor=pointer]:
        - /url: https://www.veeva.com/crossix-data-usage-policy
      - text: . © Copyright 2014 - 2025 Veeva Systems
  - generic [ref=e14]:
    - generic [ref=e15]:
      - img [ref=e16]
      - generic [ref=e21]: Welcome
      - generic [ref=e22]: Log in to your account
      - generic [ref=e23]: digital.crossix.com is now veevacrossix.com
    - generic [ref=e24]:
      - generic [ref=e25]:
        - generic [ref=e26]: Email Address
        - textbox "Email Address" [ref=e27]:
          - /placeholder: Email
      - generic [ref=e28]:
        - generic [ref=e29]: Password
        - generic [ref=e30]:
          - textbox "Password" [ref=e31]
          - button "Show password" [ref=e32] [cursor=pointer]:
            - img [ref=e34]
      - generic [ref=e36]:
        - generic [ref=e37]:
          - checkbox [ref=e40] [cursor=pointer]
          - generic [ref=e41]: Remember me
        - button "Forgot your password?" [ref=e42] [cursor=pointer]
      - button "Login" [ref=e43] [cursor=pointer]
```

notes: Next: resolve each target into a stable locator preference: data-testid > role/name > label > text.
Then write those locators into LoginPage methods or a locator map consumed by generator.
